name: Rand Paul
subject: Five days for $500,000
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
I need to raise $500,000 in the next five
days, and I'm counting on you to help me reach that goal.
It's a lot, I know. But this race Republican
nomination for President of the United States is going to come
down to the wire.
And the FEC's December 31 end of year
fundraising deadline is an absolutely critical moment for you and
me.
With less than three weeks until the next
Republican presidential debate and voters in Iowa and New
Hampshire set to head to the polls in early February, it's
absolutely critical I have the funds to hit the ground running in
January.
With over 400 grassroots organizations all
over the country, campaign chairs in all of Iowa's 99 counties to
go along with 800 precinct captains, the support of good folks
like you has helped my campaign create the foundation it will
take for us to surge to the top.
But reaching this $500,000 fundraising goal
will be absolutely critical to putting all of my campaign's final
plans for January into action.
Phone banks, mailings, non-stop campaign
stops, and TV ads all cost money.
I don't have Wall Street or special interests
handing over fat checks to my campagin. They know I'm not "their
guy."
Instead of continuing the Big Government
status quo in Washington, D.C, I aim to destroy it by following
the road map the Founders laid down for us in the U.S.
Constitution.
So please give as generously as you can --
whether that's $500, $250, $100, $50 or even $25 or $10.
I'm counting on your immediate support.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Neighbor by neighbor
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

There's no doubt in my mind: If we keep building this grassroots campaign neighbor by neighbor, not only can we mount a strong challenge to Republican Pat Toomey in the fall, we can win.

**We 're coming up on our campaign's biggest test yet -- our December 31st fundraising report**. And we've set our most ambitious fundraising goal to date -- $10,000 in grassroots donations before the end of the year.

**[If you've been waiting for the right time to chip in to this campaign, this is it. Make a donation of just $5 today and help me hit our final and most critical fundraising goal of 2015.](https://act.myngp.com/el/6946948767639666688/-3896718686861393920?refcode=e20151227&refcode2=e20151227nd&amount=5)**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6946948767639666688/-3896718686861393920?refcode=e20151227&refcode2=e20151227nd&amount=5)
---

**If we can 't meet our goal, our opponents will do everything they can to capitalize on it.** They'll try to claim that we don't have the support of the people or that Pennsylvanians don't believe in the positive nature of our campaign. But they'll be wrong. That's why I know I can count on you to step up and show your support by helping us meet this big goal.

My team was skeptical when I told them the numbers I wanted to hit, but I know that you can help us get there. We have to be aggressive in setting these goals and doing everything we can to meet them because defeating an entrenched opponent like Pat Toomey is going to take everything we've got.

[**Pitch in whatever you can now and let 's blow this year-end fundraising goal out of the water.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6946948767639666688/-3896718686861393920?refcode=e20151227&refcode2=e20151227nd&amount=5)

This campaign is fueled by small-dollar gifts from all across Pennsylvania and the country. We've yet to fall short of a single fundraising goal because of the support you've been willing to offer. I know we will get there again.

Thank you for your support,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6946948767639666688/-3896718686861393920?refcode=e20151227&refcode2=e20151227nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/6946948767639666688/-3968776280899321856).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Grassroots powerhouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
Money talks.
In just 5 days, the media, Big Government
members of BOTH parties and Federal reserve apologists are all
going to be scouring Rand's End of Year financial reports.
They know January is a HUGE month for Rand's
campaign.
On January 12, the U.S. Senate is set to vote
on Rand's Audit the Fed Bill.
Two days later is the first of just two
Republican presidential debates before voting begins.
With the Iowa caucuses set for February 1,
it's time to ramp up all of ALL of Rand's campaign efforts NOW.
That's why it's so critical we hit -- or even
surpass -- the $500,000 goal for Rand's End of Year Money Bomb.
Patriot, with the help of good folks like
you, energetic volunteers and a top-notch on-the-ground
operation, Rand's campaign is a grassroots powerhouse.
But it's time to take the next step.
The great news is, a big fundraising quarter
will not only force the national media to recognize the Rand's
campaign strength and give Rand the resources we need to surge to
the top, it could also help generate momentum for Audit the Fed!
The fact is, more than a handful of U.S.
Senators already have their fingers stuck in the air on this
pending vote on Audit the Fed.
A big fundraising quarter for Rand could
prove that grassroots patriots like you are rallying to him --
something the establishment fears more than anything else.
Patriot, whether it's on government spending,
spying, or fighting to Audit the Fed, Rand has done something no
other candidate in this race can claim.
He's delivered time and again.
Unlike others, Rand doesn't just talk the
talk. He walks the walk as well.
Rand is the real deal. Our campaign is going
to do whatever it takes to ensure voters in Iowa, New Hampshire
and around the country realize that.
So please give as generously as you can.
Help Rand reach this $500,000 fundraising
goal.
Your action could make all the difference.
In Liberty,
Doug Stafford

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: ted@tedcruz.org
subject: Time-Sensitive: personal request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend, did you hear the bad news? I'm a top target. I just found out I'm about to be hit by an avalanche, a barrage of negative print, TV, and web advertising. |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32523247:W6ldM3y7N:m:1:1104269936:ADC0D43700B0F16928C083574C7E0313:r) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend, did you hear the bad news?

I'm a top target.

I just found out **I'm about to be hit by an avalanche --** a barrage of negative print, TV, and web advertising.

I was hoping not to have to email you this soon, but with only four days before 2015 comes to an end, I face the biggest fundraising deadline of the year -- and really, the campaign.

[**CHIP IN: END OF YEAR EMERGENCY RESPONSE DONATION >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32523247:W6ldM3y7N:m:1:1104269936:ADC0D43700B0F16928C083574C7E0313:r)

_As one of my best supporters, I felt that I had better get you up to speed right away._

Here is the situation: **I'm being targeted in the key early primary states by super PACs** committed to open-border amnesty, and they're about to unleash a damaging ad campaign designed to stop our momentum, stunt our poll numbers, and dry up my campaign's financial support.

Friend, to make matters worse, I just spoke to my campaign manager. **The financial numbers he had to go over with me were, to put it bluntly,_devastating._**

We are way behind our End of the Year Fundraising/Federal Election Commission (FEC) Deadline goals -- which means I can't respond in full force to these new attacks.

[**CHIP IN: END OF YEAR EMERGENCY RESPONSE DONATION >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32523247:W6ldM3y7N:m:1:1104269936:ADC0D43700B0F16928C083574C7E0313:r)

I won't be able to respond to these ads and the liberal media elite will begin to pile on and write that our campaign is dead in the water.

In fact, **I'm worried that if I can't make up the difference before the FEC Deadline** \-- _they may be right._

Given the importance of this deadline...Friend, can I ask you for a personal favor? Will you take a moment away from what you are doing and make an instant/secure contribution to my campaign?

[**CHIP IN: END OF YEAR EMERGENCY RESPONSE DONATION >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32523247:W6ldM3y7N:m:1:1104269936:ADC0D43700B0F16928C083574C7E0313:r)

This year I've said it like it is, and the liberal media and Washington Cartel want to end my campaign because of it. They know that as president I won't cozy up to their agenda, but instead, I will slash the size of government and return our nation to Constitutional principals of government.

Here's what's at stake in 2016:

| >>> | Defeating ISIS -- before they can launch another attack on American soil.

---|---
>>> | Repealing Obamacare -- before more Americans fall victim to rate hikes and insane tax penalties.

>>> | Saving the Lives of the Unborn -- before your federal government funds another budget to subsidize the harvesting and sale of unborn babies.

>>> | Secure the Borders -- before more unidentified individuals break the law and slip into our country with harmful intentions...

Friend, the list goes on, but you certainly get the picture.

In just four days, the elite media will pour over my financials and as of now, **I need to raise $497,478 to keep from coming up short of my FEC Deadline goal.**

[**CHIP IN: END OF YEAR EMERGENCY RESPONSE DONATION >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32523247:W6ldM3y7N:m:1:1104269936:ADC0D43700B0F16928C083574C7E0313:r)

The bottom line is this: a grassroots campaign like ours can't afford setbacks. If our fundraising is not as strong as we need it to be -- the liberal media and Washington insiders will use our disappointing report to support their claim that a true conservative can't win.

**[Will you chip in $5, $35, or even $250 to ensure I can face the avalanche of negative print, TV, and web advertising headed my way?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32523247:W6ldM3y7N:m:1:1104269936:ADC0D43700B0F16928C083574C7E0313:r)**

In my travels over the past few weeks -- I've met thousands of active Republicans, and I'm telling you, they are rising up as the new generation of courageous conservatives willing to take a stand and fight for the soul of the GOP and the future of our country.

To counter the new wave of attacks, stay in this race, and unite our fellow conservatives, I'm going to need your help, Friend.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. Time is down to the wire! I cannot overstate how important it is that we post strong fundraising numbers! [The reporting deadline is December 31st at midnight.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32523247:W6ldM3y7N:m:1:1104269936:ADC0D43700B0F16928C083574C7E0313:r)

[**CHIP IN: END OF YEAR EMERGENCY RESPONSE DONATION >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32523247:W6ldM3y7N:m:1:1104269936:ADC0D43700B0F16928C083574C7E0313:r)

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org

---

name: Team Murphy
subject: Loud mouths and deep pockets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Shady right-wing special interest groups think they know how to defeat Patrick. **They believe that having loud mouths and deep pockets is enough to get the job done and keep the Senate in Republican hands.**

A SuperPAC has already put this "strategy" to work, attacking Patrick with lies about his record.

**We can 't let these lies stand.**

[**We have 5 days to show them that distortions are no match for a grassroots network. Can you give $5 or more to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal of $40,000?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21b6/738133e4/3b92c45d/7f836337/3199927045/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151227?refcode=pme151227_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

_This is our most important deadline to date._ Not only do we have a SuperPAC out there attacking Patrick with a fear-mongering smear campaign, a recent poll shows that a majority of voters are still undecided.

Will those voters be fooled by attacks? If we stay silent, you never know. **We can 't take that chance.**

[**Help us reach $40,000 and make sure we 're able to fight back and get Patrick to the Senate. We CANNOT miss this goal, and we still have $35,165 to go with only 4 days left. Anything you can contribute will make a difference.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21b6/738133e4/3b92c45d/7f836337/3199927045/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151227?refcode=pme151227_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21b6/738133e4/3b92c45d/7f836330/3199927045/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

A SuperPAC has already put this "strategy" to work, attacking Patrick with lies about his record. We can 't let these lies stand. "" This is our most important deadline to date. Not only do we have a SuperPAC out there attacking Patrick with a fear-mongering smear campaign, a recent poll shows that a majority of voters are still undecided. Will those voters be fooled by attacks? If we stay silent, you never know. We can 't take that chance. "" Thank you, Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

name: Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
subject: That Time When Donald Trump Saved A Georgia Farm
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gafarm_app_2&n=1)
---
| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gafarm_app_2&n=2)
| |
---
\- December 27, 2015 -
That Time When Donald Trump Saved A Georgia Farm
| Dear Peter, We thought you would enjoy this story from yesterday's Atlanta Journal Constitution: [That Time When Donald Trump Saved a Georgia Farm](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fpolitics.blog.ajc.com%2F2015%2F12%2F26%2Fthat-time-when-donald-trump-saved-a-georgia-farm%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gafarm_app_2&n=3) Many years ago, Donald Trump saved this family's farm and if elected President, Mr. Trump will continue to help Americans all over the country through job creation, a thriving economy, securing our border, strengthening our military and taking care of our great Vets! Mr. Trump is the only one who will Make America Great Again! May the spirit of Christmas stay with you always. We thank you for your support. Best Wishes, Team Trump
---
| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
[info@donaldtrump.com](mailto:info@donaldtrump.com)
---
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

name: Elise Dietsch
subject: FW: Making my list...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Just wanted to make sure you saw this note from Cam. Your support now is crucial to our success so we hope you'll donate and join the fundraising team today.

I know Governor Christie will be thrilled to see your name on the 2015 donor file list and will be excited with how large it has grown! **[Click here to contribute now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45567722:6rLOqsreN:m:1:1516426255:557E9360151085384CE025855B6C0E27:r)**.
Thank you,
Elise Dietsch
Deputy Finance Director
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Cam Henderson, Finance Director <info@chrischristie.com>
Date: Tue, Dec 22, 2015
Subject: Making my list...
To: Elise Dietsch

...and checking it twice.

However Elise, I don't see you on our end of the year list to close out 2015. Since our books officially close for the year on December 31st, we're looking to make sure we get your donation before then. Below is your personal entry listed in our database:
**End of Year Donor: Pending
Campaign Action: Follow Up**
To follow up, can I change your status from "Pending" to "Donor"? If so, please click one of the special donation links below we've set up for you.

**[Suggested Donation Amounts:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45567722:6rLOqsreN:m:1:1516426255:557E9360151085384CE025855B6C0E27:r)**
**[<<< $5 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45567723:6rLOqsreN:m:1:1516426255:557E9360151085384CE025855B6C0E27:r)**
**[<<< $10 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45567724:6rLOqsreN:m:1:1516426255:557E9360151085384CE025855B6C0E27:r)**
**[<<< $25 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45567725:6rLOqsreN:m:1:1516426255:557E9360151085384CE025855B6C0E27:r)**
**[<<< $50 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45567726:6rLOqsreN:m:1:1516426255:557E9360151085384CE025855B6C0E27:r)**

****
****
The end of the year is a very important time for our campaign, so your **[support of any donation amount is vital to our success](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45567722:6rLOqsreN:m:1:1516426255:557E9360151085384CE025855B6C0E27:r)**. I'm looking forward to hearing back from you.

Thank you,

Cam Henderson
Finance Director
Chris Christie 2016

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45567722:6rLOqsreN:m:1:1516426255:557E9360151085384CE025855B6C0E27:r)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I need you before 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Before the end of the year: | Friend --

I hope you got to enjoy some time off this weekend (I was so happy to see Bill, Chelsea, Marc, and especially Charlotte!), but now it's time to get back to work: We're just four days away from the biggest fundraising deadline yet of this campaign.

**[I need your help -- we need just 31 more donations from supporters in your area before the end of the year to hit our goal. Can you chip in $1 right now to help us get there?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This is about more than money. It's about showing the world how strong we are, that you and other folks from your area and Virginia and all over the country are standing together as part of this team.

**I can't do this without you. If you're with me, chip in $1 right now, and let’s show the world what we’re about:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQzMzcyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNzI5NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
